content: Swift on Linux: AVFoundation, EventKit, UIKit, AppKit unavailable (proprietary, Obj-C runtime dependent). Only Foundation, Dispatch, XCTest, Swift Testing available cross-platform. Use #if canImport(Framework) guards (preferred over #if os()). Swift Testing is cross-platform (Apple/Linux/Windows). swift test only supports host-native tests, no cross-compile. SwiftFormat works on Linux without Xcode. SwiftLint on Linux is awkward - SwiftPM plugin is cleanest path. Fatbobman guide covers full Swift dev on Linux with SourceKit-LSP. Run compiler in Linux Docker for cross-platform sanity check.
